prompt: Premium Capture The Flag operations hub for a fantasy multiplayer game.
subject: A centered game menu hub with four mode cards for Play, Shop, Match, and Admin
scene: Full-screen in-game menu overlay floating over a soft sky arena backdrop
style: Shippable game UI mockup with refined fantasy materials and restrained ornament
composition: Wide landscape screen, centered window, strong focal title, clear spacing and visual hierarchy
lighting: Soft ambient glow, matte finish, readable contrast, no bloom-heavy effects
palette: Dark slate and navy base, aged brass trim, restrained cyan accents, muted parchment highlights
materials: Matte lacquered panels, worn brass borders, faint rune engravings, subtle stone insets, soft leather-like button plates
constraints: Highly readable, premium fantasy tone, no sci-fi gloss, no clutter, no watermark
negative: glossy futurism, purple neon, glassmorphism, excessive particles, noisy background, tiny text, illegible buttons

prompt: Dense fantasy admin and status management screen for Capture The Flag.
subject: A readable game management screen with data tables, status rows, action sections, and quick tools
scene: In-game overlay for staff tools and live status review
style: Production-ready game admin UI with refined fantasy art direction
composition: Wide landscape management screen, strong section framing, compact but breathable table layout, clear action zones
lighting: Low-gloss surfaces, soft rim light, crisp readability, subdued atmosphere
palette: Navy and charcoal panels, brass section dividers, subtle cyan information accents, occasional muted ember tones for warnings
materials: Engraved brass trim, matte lacquer, faint rune linework, leather-inspired action plates, stone-like inset surfaces
constraints: Prioritize legibility and order, no sci-fi dashboard look, no heavy ornament over text, no watermark
negative: chrome, holograms, sharp neon, busy filigree, over-textured panels, unreadable tables, glossy reflections

prompt: Refined fantasy game UI asset sheet focused on reusable control surfaces and action plates.
subject: An organized asset sheet showing button plate variants, divider trims, corner motifs, inset panel treatments, and small crest chips
scene: Neutral presentation board for UI component exploration
style: Game UI concept art sheet with clean organization and premium fantasy material study
composition: Top-down asset sheet with evenly spaced components and generous margins
lighting: Neutral studio lighting with matte surfaces and restrained highlights
palette: Slate navy, antique brass, cyan accent, muted bone and charcoal
materials: Brass edging, carved rune grooves, lacquered navy plates, leather tabs, dark stone backing
constraints: No text labels, no watermark, components should feel modular and reusable, avoid ornate excess
negative: sci-fi widgets, glossy plastic, toy-like buttons, oversaturated colors, messy layout

prompt: Mood board for a refined fantasy tactical game interface.
subject: A material and ornament board exploring engraved trim, subtle rune motifs, matte navy lacquer, worn brass edges, and understated fantasy control-panel styling
scene: Curated mood board of close-up UI materials and decorative details
style: Elegant fantasy UI concept board with premium restraint
composition: Balanced board of cropped material studies and ornamental detail panels
lighting: Soft museum-style lighting, low sheen, tactile material definition
palette: Midnight navy, deep slate, aged brass, faint cyan, soft parchment undertones
materials: Brushed brass, etched runes, lacquered wood-like navy surfaces, dark stone, soft leather
constraints: Subtle and premium, no heavy medieval clutter, no watermark, keep motifs restrained and production-friendly
negative: gaudy fantasy, bright gold overload, purple magic glow, high-gloss lacquer, excessive symbols, cluttered collage
